hooks.description: Automatically format markdown files with prettier after Claude stops responding

_metadata.description: Stop hook configuration for prettier-markdown-hook plugin

notes.event: Stop hook triggers after Claude finishes responding
notes.command: Uses ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} variable for portability across installations
notes.priority: 100 = early in hook chain (higher priority hooks run first)
notes.continueOnError: Other hooks continue even if this hook fails

troubleshooting.hookNotRunning: Check that dependencies (prettier, jq, git) are installed
troubleshooting.timeout: Increase timeout value if formatting large workspaces
